Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCATALOGO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTLNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTLNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTLNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &CtlSts = nullvalue(&CtlSts) Form.Caption = 'Catálagos da Tabela' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if 1=2 WWCatalogoMenu.Link() EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh If &TabCod.IsEmpty() &TabCod = &parTabCod EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount CtlSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = Catalogo.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, CtlCod) &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Catalogo.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, CtlCod) &actions2.Clear() &actions2.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &actions2.AddItem(1, 'Add Produtos') &actions2.AddItem(2, 'Importar Excel') &actions2.AddItem(3, 'Enviar E-mail') &actions2.AddItem(4, 'Imprimir') &actions2.AddItem(5, 'Exportar Excel') Do Case Case CtlSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO CtlSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case CtlSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO CtlSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise CtlSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &actions2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &actions2 = 1 Do 'Do AdicionarProdutos' Case &actions2 = 2 Do 'Do ImpotarExcel' Case &actions2 = 3 Do 'Do Enviaremail' Case &actions2 = 4 Do 'Do Imprimir' Case &actions2 = 5 Do 'Do ExportExcel' EndCase &actions2 = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Imprimir_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpImprimirCatalogo.Create('I', EmpCod, &FilCod, CtlCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Imprimir_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExportExcel_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpImprimirCatalogo.Create('E', EmpCod, &FilCod, CtlCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExportExcel_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Catalogo.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(CtlCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CtlNom1.Visible = False &CtlTabPrmCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTLNOM' &CtlNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTLTABPRMCOD' &CtlTabPrmCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CtlNom2.Visible = False &CtlTabPrmCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTLNOM' &CtlNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTLTABPRMCOD' &CtlTabPrmCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CtlNom3.Visible = False &CtlTabPrmCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTLNOM' &CtlNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTLTABPRMCOD' &CtlTabPrmCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTLNOM' &CtlNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTLNOM' &CtlNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AdicionarProdutos' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wwcatalogoproduto.Call(EmpCod, CtlCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImpotarExcel' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ImportarCatalogo.Call(EmpCod, CtlCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Enviaremail' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpenviacatalogo.PopUp(EmpCod, CtlCod, 0) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Imprimir' // wpImprimirCatalogo.Popup('I', EmpCod, &FilCod, CtlCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Imprimir_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExportExcel' // wpImprimirCatalogo.Popup('E', EmpCod, &FilCod, CtlCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ExportExcel_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABCOD" &TabCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTLSTS" &CtlSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTLNOM' &CtlNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTLTABPRMCOD' &CtlTabPrmCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABCOD", "", not &TabCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTLSTS", "", not &CtlSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CtlSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTLNOM' AND not &CtlNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtlNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTLTABPRMCOD' AND not &CtlTabPrmCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtlTabPrmCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTLNOM' AND not &CtlNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtlNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTLTABPRMCOD' AND not &CtlTabPrmCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtlTabPrmCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTLNOM' AND not &CtlNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtlNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTLTABPRMCOD' AND not &CtlTabPrmCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtlTabPrmCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Catalogo" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
